description:
Today bl dep tree prints a flat list with [ ] checkboxes — it is not a tree. Fix by walking parent + depends_on edges and rendering with box-drawing characters.

Format (Unicode default, ASCII fallback):
  bl-a3f8  Migrate auth layer                         [epic]  ○ open
  ├── bl-1234  Extract token store                            ✓ closed
  ├── bl-5678  Swap middleware                                » in_progress
  │   └── bl-9abc  Audit rollback plan                        ⛓ gates parent
  └── bl-def0  Cut over prod switch                           ⌀ blocked by bl-5678

With no id argument: render every root (parentless task) as a separate top-level tree.
With id: render the subtree rooted at that id, following children (parent edge) first, deps second (shown as annotations, not nesting).

Cycle detection: if a cycle is encountered, mark the repeated node with (↺ cycle) and stop descending.

ASCII fallback prefixes: |--, `--, |  , (space)(space)(space)(space).

--json: emit a nested structure rather than re-using the flat task list. Shape:
  { id, title, status, children: [ ... ] }
title: bl dep tree: actual tree rendering with box-drawing
